title: Communications Coordinator
description: Support PepsiCo's internal and external communications as a Communications Coordinator, helping tell our story to stakeholders.
responsibilities: Create and edit communications content for multiple channels
Support social media management and engagement
Coordinate internal communication initiatives and campaigns
Support event planning and PR activities
Analyze communications metrics and gather feedback

requirements.education: High school diploma or equivalent; relevant degree or certification strongly preferred

benefits: Flexible time off and work arrangements
